description: LOS-TERRAIN (13.09 HIDDEN, player-facing reason): same centre-strip geometry as the near scenario but the Custodian Guard stand ~18" away. The Boyz models on the dense strip are hidden (INFANTRY within a dense-containing terrain area, no recent shooting) and the shooters are beyond the 15" detection range, while the rest of the unit is fully obscured behind the strip (13.10) - so the unit is NOT targetable, and the UI must say WHY (the Hidden rule + distances), not a bare 'No line of sight'. Clicking the ineligible enemy surfaces the reason as a toast + dice-log line.

steps.comment: beyond 15" detection the hidden on-strip models are not visible; the rest of the unit is obscured (13.10)
the player-facing reason names the Hidden rule instead of a bare 'no line of sight'
P3-96: with every enemy hidden/obscured/out of range the unit cannot even be selected to shoot - the exact situation from the user report
drive the same feedback the UI shows when the player clicks the unit: per-enemy reasons in the dice log + a warning toast
the explanatory toast is on screen
